allow: PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($node\){"node: $\($node.Source\)"}else{"node: 無"}; $py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($py\){"python: $\($py.Source\)"}else{"python: 無"}; $py3 = \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($py3\){"py: $\($py3.Source\)"}else{"py: 無"})
